title: Bitcoin falls below $66,000 and cryptocurrencies drop amid geopolitical tension
summary: Uncertainty over Iran and widespread risk aversion drag down digital asset prices, with Ethereum also in the red.

title: Wall Street points to a moderate opening higher after tech rout and oil respite
summary: Futures for US indices anticipate a mild rebound as investors digest Middle East tensions and new tariffs.

title: The 'Magnificent Seven' suffer a negative turning point and the tech sector crashes due to AI fears and war escalation
summary: Intel exemplifies the artificial intelligence dilemma in its results, while tension with Iran intensifies selling pressure on big tech.

title: Oil reaches $100 and triggers a bond sell-off and declines in Asian stock markets
summary: Crude hits the $100 barrier, unleashing a sell-off in global debt markets and dragging down Asian markets due to fears of inflation and escalation in the Middle East.

title: The Ibex 35 rises 1% and recovers 19,450 points driven by Acerinox and Sabadell, while Mapfre falls due to its purchase in the US
summary: The Spanish selective benefits from corporate earnings and Sabadell's share buyback, in a session marked by the imposition of new US tariffs.

title: Commerzbank gives in and agrees to negotiate its acquisition by UniCredit
summary: After weeks of resistance, the German bank opens dialogue with the Italian institution to explore a possible merger, according to press reports.

title: The ECB presents the new designs of euro banknotes with Beethoven, Cervantes, and a bird
summary: The future banknotes will incorporate cultural and natural motifs in a redesign that seeks to modernize the image of the single currency.

title: The Central Bank of Russia cuts interest rates for the tenth consecutive time to shore up the economy
summary: The Russian monetary authority continues its easing cycle amid economic slowdown and low inflation.

title: The ECB anticipates a rate hike in September and raises its inflation forecast for 2027
summary: The Governing Council keeps rates at 2.25% but prepares a hawkish adjustment for September and increases its price projections.

title: Berkshire Hathaway: its cash pile generates more annual income than most S&P 500 companies
summary: Two analyses highlight the financial strength of Warren Buffett's conglomerate and the succession challenge, with a strong balance sheet.

title: Executive movements: notable buys and sells at Artiva, StoneX, and CoreWeave, and Vickers' picks
summary: Insider transaction reports reveal significant trades, while the Vickers tool highlights stocks with the highest insider activity.

title: S&P Global upgrades Mapfre's rating to 'A' but the market punishes its US purchase with 5% drop
summary: The insurer sees its financial strength recognized by the agency, while investors react negatively to the acquisition in the US market.

title: SpaceX: a potential of $1.6 trillion but a stock performance below the average of IPOs
summary: Elon Musk's space company shows enormous potential in the space sector, although its stock price since the IPO has been worse than most IPOs since 2009.

title: Selection of stocks to watch ahead of the next earnings season on Wall Street
summary: Analysts highlight several companies with potential for movement on technicals and key earnings releases.

title: European stock markets rise driven by corporate earnings and UK activity rebound
summary: The FTSE 100 hits a three-month high and the German DAX seeks 25,000 points, boosted by corporate profits and positive economic data.
